description: P31 Labs canonical social posts. Each entry includes content + platform targets. Render via: node forge.js social "..." <platform>

posts.content: P31 Labs, Inc. — officially a Georgia 501(c)(3) in formation as of April 3, 2026. Open-source cognitive infrastructure for neurodivergent minds, built by neurodivergent hands. Phosphorus alone burns. Inside the cage, it's stable.
EIN assigned today. 1023-EZ staged. Board expansion in progress. Open-source assistive tech for neurodivergent minds, on the record.

BONDING is live at bonding.p31ca.org. Educational multiplayer chemistry game for kids 6+. Build molecules by dragging atoms. 413 automated tests. NGSS-aligned. Free, open-source, AGPLv3. Built for my kids; shipped for yours.

Shipped P31 Forge — the document-generation engine behind every legal filing, grant application, and board resolution we produce. One brand system. One content-pack schema. CLI + HTTP + Cloudflare Worker. AGPLv3. Fork it: github.com/p31labs
Paper IV: Universal Bridge — now on Zenodo (DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19503542). Open-access, CC-BY-4.0. Part of the Cognitive Passport series documenting neurodivergent AI-assisted research methodology.

P31 Labs is seeking one independent director to complete our board for IRS 1023-EZ filing. Looking for a disability self-advocate with governance experience or interest. Unpaid, meets quarterly, fully remote. DM if interested.
